name: Retro Sniper
short_description: A fast-paced 2D tactical sniper shooter with retro arcade style. 49 missions across 15 campaigns — from desert warfare and cyber cities to zombie graveyards and dark carnivals. Unlock devastating weapons, fight helicopters, jets, sharks, and killer clowns. Spare the civilians or pay the price.
detailed_description:
Special Edition

SPECIAL EDITION — What's New?

The Special Edition of Retro Sniper: Jet/Tiger Down expands the original 41-mission campaign with two terrifying bonus campaigns and a complete visual overhaul.

2 New Bonus Campaigns (8 New Levels):

The Dead Zone (Levels 42-45) — The battlefield becomes a graveyard. Zombies swarm from all directions — fast-moving zombie runners, hulking zombie brutes, and a massive zombie boss that takes everything you've got to bring down. Survival horror meets tactical sniping.

Fun Dark (Levels 46-49) — A twisted dark carnival where nothing is fun and everything wants you dead. Killer clowns, possessed mascots, and evil carnies stalk the grounds, leading to a showdown with the monstrous carnival boss. The most unhinged campaign in the game.

Campaign Backgrounds — Every Campaign Now Has Its Own World:

The original game used generic backgrounds. The Special Edition adds hand-crafted, full-screen campaign backdrops that transform every environment:

Campaign Background

Desert Ops Dust-swept wasteland

Mirage Ops Scorching desert dunes

Cold Front Frozen arctic tundra

Maritime Strike Coastal shoreline

Arctic Siege Ice-covered battlefield

Final Push War-torn endgame zone

Space Operations Deep space starfield

Deep Sea Underwater ocean depths

Rail Wars Speeding train backdrop

Cyber Assault Neon cyberpunk cityscape

Prison Break Maximum-security facility

The Dead Zone Haunted graveyard

Fun Dark Sinister dark carnival

Standard Edition: 41 levels, 13 campaigns, basic backgrounds

Special Edition: 49 levels, 15 campaigns, 13 unique campaign backdrops, zombies, killer clowns, and pure chaos


About the Game

Edvanced Special Addition Vesion of Retro Sniper -  2 Extra Campaigns -  Upgraded ! Visually Enhanced.

Retro Sniper:  is a fast-paced 2D tactical sniper shooter wrapped in retro arcade style. Lock, load, and eliminate your way through 49 missions across 15 campaigns — each with its own hand-crafted environment and unique backdrop.

From deserts to deep space to the undead — no two campaigns play the same.

Start in sun-scorched dust storms and war-torn urban streets. Push through frozen arctic tundras, tropical maritime shorelines, and classified jungle ops. Then things get wild — board speeding trains in Rail Wars, infiltrate neon-drenched megacities in Cyber Assault, storm maximum-security lockups in Prison Break, battle in zero gravity during Space Operations, and dive into the abyss for Deep Sea combat against sharks, giant squids, and underwater enemy bases.

Think you've seen it all? Think again.

Survive the Dead Zone — a graveyard overrun with zombies, zombie runners, towering zombie brutes, and a terrifying zombie boss. Then step right up to Fun Dark — a twisted dark carnival crawling with killer clowns, possessed mascots, evil carnies, and a monstrous carnival boss. These bonus campaigns push your skills to the absolute limit.

Your arsenal grows with the chaos.

Begin with a precision sniper rifle, then unlock machine guns, high-explosive grenades, and tactical nukes as enemies escalate from foot soldiers to helicopters, jets, armored tanks, and even UFOs.

Civilians are everywhere — and so are the consequences.

Mermaids, hostages, prisoners, and innocent bystanders roam every battlefield. One stray bullet means heavy penalties. Precision isn't optional — it's survival.

Key Features:

🎯 49 levels across 15 campaigns — from military ops to zombie apocalypse to horror carnival

🔫 4 unlockable weapons: sniper rifle, machine gun, anti-materiel rifle, rocket launcher

💣 Grenades and tactical nukes for when things get desperate

🚁 Fight helicopters, jets, tanks, UFOs, sharks, giant squids, zombies, and killer clowns

🚂 Unique environments: moving trains, cyber cities, prisons, outer space, underwater bases, graveyards, dark carnivals

🛡️ Civilian protection system — spare the innocent or pay the price

🏆 27 Steam achievements and cloud save support

🎮 Full gamepad support including Steam Deck

Lock in. Line up the shot. Don't miss.
